name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA Women's Small Hop Python 🐍 In Stock 📣📣📣. The snake skin series hasn't seen new arrivals in a while, and this release proves Hop's growing popularity. Hop is deeply loved for its ample capacity and simple, generous design, often being hard to get. The python skin features clear patterns and full color. Hop's minimalism fully displays the wild beauty of the python. Only those who truly appreciate this style can carry it off.
